title: Introducing Laguna S 2.1
excerpt: Today we’re releasing Laguna S 2.1, a significant step forward in our development of models that pursue longer horizon work and make effective use of reasoning.
content_html:
Today we’re releasing Laguna S 2.1, a significant step forward in our development of models that pursue longer horizon work and make effective use of reasoning.

Laguna S 2.1 is a 118B total parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model with 8B activated parameters per token and supports a context window of up to 1M tokens in thinking and no-thinking modes. It went from the start of training to launch in under nine weeks, and on long-horizon coding benchmarks it holds its own against models many times its size. For every benchmark score we publish today, we are releasing full trajectories for every trial in the final evaluation set at trajectories.poolside.ai.

  • Laguna S 2.1 118B-A8B
  • Tencent Hy3 295B-A21B
  • Inkling 975B-A41B
  • Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B-A55B
  • DeepSeek-V4-Pro-Max 1.6T-A49B
  • Kimi K3 2.8T-A50B

Punching above its weight class

Laguna S 2.1 is, as far as we can measure, the most capable agentic coding model in its weight class by a wide margin.

S 2.1 scores 70.2% on Terminal-Bench 2.1 in our agent harness with thinking enabled. Its compact size makes it uniquely suitable for complex work on local machines.

Terminal-Bench 2.1 evaluates a wide, high-quality set of long-horizon tasks where an agent model is connected to its environment through a terminal. Laguna S 2.1 is a standout model in its size category on this benchmark.

A closer look at DeepSWE

The benchmarks above are all meaningful, and we're glad to be close to the frontier on them. But part of that closeness is a property of maturing benchmarks: as the frontier advances, top scores cluster in the 70-90% range and models that behave very differently end up no more than a few points apart. Datacurve’s DeepSWE still has significant headroom. Its tasks are longer-horizon and hard to partially solve, and the scores actually spread: frontier models range from 54% to 73% on the v1.1 variant, with some 1T+ parameter open models scoring below 10%.

On DeepSWE v1.1, Laguna S 2.1 scores 40.4 in thinking mode in pool harness.

It is worth noting that Laguna S 2.1 scored 40.4% in our agent harness, pool, not mini-swe-agent which DeepSWE’s leaderboard uses. For other models we report maximal over reported scores which for most models are the official leaderboard results reported by Datacurve. While this makes scores less comparable, we don’t believe it puts us in a particularly advantageous position as it’s been reported that many of the models score the same or better in mini-swe-agent compared to their native harnesses. Every trajectory in the final evaluation run is available here.

Evaluation methodology

Evaluation of agent models is notoriously difficult due to prevalence of reward hacking. We have previously written about reward hacking in leading benchmarks and our evaluations system and rigor as part of the technical report on our Laguna M.1 and XS.2 models. Recent work has focused on adversarial judging to increase reward hacking detection.

With this release, we are making all trajectories from our final evaluations of the published Laguna S 2.1 checkpoint available to view and download at trajectories.poolside.ai.

Seeing the model work

Benchmark scores give a quantitative view into the model behavior, but to get a better intuitive understanding of how the model works it’s useful to look into runs on real world tasks. We share three such tasks with unedited trajectories and commentary.

Case study 1

A browser engine from a blank folder

One of our favorite things about Laguna S 2.1 is its resourcefulness: It will find clever ways to get to the goal even if the direct path is not available. We saw a great demonstration of this when we asked it to build a browser engine from scratch; knowing it would be a challenge for Laguna to verify its work given its lack of vision capabilities. In one 50-minute session of 181 steps, with no human intervention, Laguna S 2.1 built a working HTML/CSS rendering engine from an empty folder, then proved it renders like a real browser by measuring itself against one. Throughout its work, the model found increasingly complex ways to validate its work despite its limitations, leading to running headless Chromium to read canvases back and comparing screenshots numerically. See the full trajectory here.

Read the full case study 
// the verbatim prompt · reproduce it yourself
your job is it to build a simple browser engine (just html/css) in
javascript to demonstrate the capabilities of poolsides new "Laguna S"
model. the goal is to take render html snippets in a canvas like a real
browser. to demonstrate it the engine, build a self-contained single
page app that showcases a gallery of multiple html snippets and renders
them side by side (canvas with our render engine + iframe letting the
hosting browser render it for real for comparison). support for most
common layout and styling elements

Over the session the model built the full pipeline, parser → cascade → layout → renderer, in vanilla JavaScript: an HTML tokenizer and DOM tree, a CSS parser with selector specificity, a cascade engine with inheritance, box-model layout, and a canvas-2D renderer, wrapped in an app that shows nine snippets on its own canvas beside the same markup in an iframe, so the hosting browser sits right there as the reference.

Case study 2

Optimizing our own harness

Laguna S 2.1 is capable of pursuing meaningful engineering and research work. In one example, one of our researchers pointed it at our agent harness, used for training/evaluation and user interaction with our models. In an automated loop, Laguna S 2.1 made our harness 5.2% faster with ~70% lower memory allocation. See the full trajectory here.

Read the full case study

For this task, we instrumented the harness with benchmarks so the model could see exactly where the time and memory went. We set strict rules: one approach at a time, benchmark after every change, keep only what measurably wins. We then ran Laguna S 2.1 in an automated research loop that fed each result back to it and pushed it to keep improving.

Results. Over multiple hours of work, Laguna S 2.1 found and implemented multiple different optimizations in our agent harness, resulting in an overall speedup of 5.2%, and reducing memory allocation by ~70%. The plot below shows the progression of the optimization, with the insights and discoveries the model made along its way.

Laguna S 2.1 found that streaming-token accumulation used O(n^2) string concatenation and replaced it with buffers. It also found several instances of redundant copying and over-allocation during trajectory materialization, which it resolved by memoizing materializations and pre-allocating slices to their exact sizes.

Notably, after speedup improvements became marginal and hard to measure in our setup, Laguna S 2.1 kept driving forward, continuing to optimize. It found that memory allocation was more accurately measured and focused its effort there. This reinforces the notion that Laguna S 2.1 truly is a model that doesn't give up and understands limitations of its environment and it is able to progress despite that.

While the benchmarks used here are not a full production test, we validated the final run with Go's race detector and go vet gating enabled, and we tested the final artifact to confirm it works. This gives us confidence that the model's intermediate solutions were valid, stable software rather than gains bought with hidden race conditions.

Case study 3

Re-deriving Erdős problem #397, offline, in Perl

We found Laguna S 2.1 more capable in mathematics than any model we have developed to date. It independently discovered a proof to Erdős problem #397 (Erdős, Graham, Ruzsa, Straus, 1975), finding a construction that yields an infinite family of solutions. This is an independent re-discovery, as a proof to the conjecture was found earlier in January 2026 by GPT-5.2 Pro. We are confident that this result was not influenced by the previous result given that the model has a knowledge cutoff date in November 2025. Before GPT 5.2 Pro’s solution, this problem remained open for over 50 years. See the full trajectory here.

Read the full case study 
// the verbatim prompt
this is an unsolved problem, solve it. Let B_k = C(2k, k) denote the
k-th central binomial coefficient. Erdős, Graham, Ruzsa and Straus
asked: are there only finitely many solutions to
B_m1 · B_m2 · … · B_mr = B_n1 · B_n2 · … · B_ns
where all of the indices are DISTINCT integers ≥ 2?
Resolve this question, with complete proof.

S 2.1 worked over 68 minutes to discover a conclusive solution. The sandbox had no Python; the model found Perl and did its number theory there: brute-force exact prime factorizations, pattern analysis, a conjectured family, then the proof: a closed-form infinite family of eight-index solutions.

B11+10n · B14+12n · B18+15n · B22+20n = B12+10n · B13+12n · B17+15n · B23+20nfor every n ≥ 0

While the result is a rediscovery, not a first solution, the family Laguna S 2.1 derived is structurally different from the earlier published construction (eight indices growing linearly vs the known six-index family), showing a fresh derivation rather than reciting from memory.

We found Laguna S 2.1 to be an exceptionally persistent problem solver across domains, finding ways to utilize all tools its environment has to offer, and pushing until it gets the job done. It is this characteristic that makes it so competitive even when compared to models multiple times its size.

Thinking effort

Laguna S 2.1 has two thinking modes: off and max (enabled by default) where it determines the right thinking/test-time compute budget for a given problem. We have observed coherent, productive thinking over several hours and hundreds of thousands of tokens in length.

Max thinking lifts S 2.1’s score on Terminal-Bench 2.1 from 60.4% to 70.2% and on DeepSWE from 16.5% to 40.4%. We are releasing this model without user-configurable effort (low-medium-high) control today to get Laguna S 2.1 into the hands of users immediately.

The two modes still give you a real choice, and it's worth seeing what each point costs:

Limitations

We are excited about the capabilities of Laguna S 2.1, in general as well as in the context of its size. In order to learn quickly we are making the model available with some known limitations that we are working on for the next iteration:

Harness overfitting: in some cases, we observe that Laguna S 2.1 struggles with adhering to tool schema definitions in third-party agent harnesses (e.g., the terminal tool in Hermes Agent) which are very similar to those in our native harness but with slight differences. In this case, the model may rely on its memory of the tool interface on the first use of the tool instead of following the definition. This is typically resolved through in-context learning should the harness reject the invalid tool call and ask the model to retry.

Nested tool calls: Laguna S 2.1 is guided to use a tool call format where tool calls are marked by XML-like tags:

<tool_call>terminal<arg_key>cmd</arg_key><arg_value>uname -a</arg_value></tool_call>

In cases where a tool argument expects a JSON array (e.g., Pi’s edit tool) the model may generate incorrectly escaped or invalid JSON.

Longer than expected thinking duration/overthinking: Laguna S 2.1 may think for long sequences before making progress, especially when working through competition mathematics problems. In future models we will introduce effort control for thinking as well as seeking to improve thinking efficiency.

What actually changed in this model

If the bet is long-horizon work, what did we improve that helps a model keep going? For S 2.1, it isn't just increasing the model size.

What we've done in this model is not necessarily add more intelligence, but improve the behaviors that lead to a more capable model: more verification, less taking things for granted, not declaring victory early, and being more persistent.”

The easiest way to see this is to watch the model work. Earlier Laguna series models would declare victory on a partially-passing test suite or abandon an approach two steps before it worked, S 2.1 keeps going.

We believe in scaling laws and will keep training larger models. What Laguna S 2.1 suggests is that raw intelligence is one axis, and the model's way of working (persistence, verification, willingness to backtrack) is a second axis that matters immensely. We're investing in both: our next, larger, Laguna series model began pre-training last week.

A strong base, then new post-training

Laguna S 2.1 is a scale-up of the Laguna XS family, trained on exactly the same pre-training data as XS 2.1: the step from XS 2.1 to S 2.1 was scale, training-code fixes, and small recipe changes, not new data. S 2.1 is also our first model where RL was done in FP8 precision, accelerating that part of the training.

The long agentic sessions in this post routinely accumulate hundreds of thousands of tokens of working context. Extending to a 1M-token context window enables the strongest performance on hard tasks.

The majority of what separates S 2.1 from the XS models comes from post-training, in two stages: an SFT stage that bootstraps capabilities partly with synthetic data, then RL, reserved for tasks the model can't yet solve at a high pass rate.

Distribution of post-training tasks

Our training corpus spans 409k agentic and non-agentic environments; within this, 83k setups are dedicated to terminal use cases, while 168k target standard software engineering workflows. These task sets were curated from open-source repositories, synthesized by our internal teams, including a specialized system for automatic dependency installation, or secured via strategic acquisitions from external data vendors.

Software-engineering tasks are mostly grounded in real code history: the largest source reproduces real commits (~38,000 tasks across ~17,000 repositories). The next reproduces merged pull requests and the remaining tasks are to fix injected bugs or reconstruct deleted files against a test suite. New for S 2.1 is agentic repository installation: given a repository, install every dependency and get the test suite running.

Terminal tasks come from datasets where agents build unseen environments and tasks from a seed.

What changed in the training loop

More generous rollout budgets: substantially longer timeouts, more tokens per turn, and more turns per task than any model before it (likely one reason for its persistence).

Better sandbox infrastructure: RL moved to a new sandboxing service, enabling background processes, selective network blocking to shrink reward-hacking surface and artifact caching to avoid overloading external services.

Multi-harness rollouts: the same prompts are rolled out in several agent harnesses, so the model learns behaviors that carry across scaffolds instead of overfitting to one.

The bets we're making

Laguna S 2.1 began pre-training on 4,096 NVIDIA H200 GPUs on May 22, 2026, 60 days ago. The Model Factory supports a high cadence of releases because building on foundations of work done, whether in pre-training data, architecture ablations or our evaluations stack, is automatic. In particular, advancements in post-training have enabled us to unlock more from test-time compute. Of all models we have trained to date, Laguna S 2.1 has the greatest delta in evaluations and perceived quality between its non-thinking mode and thinking mode: its internal monologue is very effective, especially for harder, complex problems.

A small team can only move this fast by focusing. We focus on two bets.

The first bet: we continue to focus on agentic coding capabilities. The path to intelligence runs through coding capability and the flexible interface that is software. This is increasingly evident as model intelligence advances: we now see hours- and days-long coherent work from models acting as agents, using software to interact with their environment. Laguna S 2.1 shows capabilities in this domain that were reserved for frontier models just 6 months ago at a small enough size to run on a single NVIDIA DGX Spark.

The second bet is that the web can be decompressed: almost everything humanity has written records the answer, not the thinking that got there, and we believe reinforcement learning can recover that thinking. This release is evidence for the first bet. The second we're still actively developing and excited to share more about in the future.

Three models in three months

Our internal platform for research and engineering, which we refer to as the Model Factory, allows us to industrialize the model development process. We invest heavily into continuously improving the process of how we conduct research and model building; to maximize research iteration and integration speed, and to minimize the amount of attention researchers need to pay to bookkeeping and infrastructure.

In less than 3 months from our Laguna M.1 release, we have pushed our techniques to deliver a substantially stronger model at half the running size. We are taking this forward to larger and larger models over the coming year.

Get started

Laguna S 2.1 is available on Hugging Face from day one under OpenMDW-1.1, with BF16, FP8, INT4 and NVFP4 weights, official GGUF and MLX conversions, and official DFlash draft models.

We worked across the ecosystem so developers can run Laguna S 2.1 where they already build. NVIDIA helped optimize inference across its hardware, from TRT-LLM serving and NVFP4 on Blackwell systems down to a single NVIDIA DGX Spark. vLLM, SGLang and Ollama support open serving and local inference from day one.

For hosted access, Laguna S 2.1 is available through Baseten’s Model Library and Frontier Gateway, OpenRouter, including a free endpoint and a dedicated 1M-context deployment, and Vercel AI Gateway.

You can also use Laguna S 2.1 through Kilo, Hermes Agent, pi, OpenCode, OpenClaw and Cline, as well as pool, our terminal-based coding agent. In pool, toggle thinking per session with /thought-level.

On OpenRouter, the free endpoint offers 256K context. A dedicated paid endpoint provides the full 1M context window at $0.10 input, $0.20 output and $0.01 cache-read per 1M tokens.

For developers who want to go further, Laguna S 2.1 can be post-trained with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel and Prime Intellect’s Prime Lab. ZML’s LLMD framework runs it across a wide range of hardware.

If you’re not a developer, chat.poolside.ai is a simple web chat with web search and basic code execution. No login required.

If you want the base model, meaning the pre-post-training weights for research or your own post-training, email models@poolside.ai.

While the benchmarks used here are not a full production test, we validated the final run with Go's race detector and go vet gating enabled, and we tested the final artifact to confirm it works. This gives us confidence that the model's intermediate solutions were valid, stable software rather than gains bought with hidden race conditions.Case study 3 Re-deriving Erdős problem #397, offline, in Perl We found Laguna S 2.1 more capable in mathematics than any model we have developed to date. It independently discovered a proof to Erdős problem #397 (Erdős, Graham, Ruzsa, Straus, 1975), finding a construction that yields an infinite family of solutions. This is an independent re-discovery, as a proof to the conjecture was found earlier in January 2026 by GPT-5.2 Pro. We are confident that this result was not influenced by the previous result given that the model has a knowledge cutoff date in November 2025. Before GPT 5.2 Pro’s solution, this problem remained open for over 50 years. See the full trajectory here. Read the full case study // the verbatim prompt this is an unsolved problem, solve it. Let B_k = C(2k, k) denote the k-th central binomial coefficient. Erdős, Graham, Ruzsa and Straus asked: are there only finitely many solutions to B_m1 · B_m2 · … · B_mr = B_n1 · B_n2 · … · B_ns where all of the indices are DISTINCT integers ≥ 2? Resolve this question, with complete proof. S 2.1 worked over 68 minutes to discover a conclusive solution. The sandbox had no Python; the model found Perl and did its number theory there: brute-force exact prime factorizations, pattern analysis, a conjectured family, then the proof: a closed-form infinite family of eight-index solutions. B11+10n · B14+12n · B18+15n · B22+20n = B12+10n · B13+12n · B17+15n · B23+20nfor every n ≥ 0 While the result is a rediscovery, not a first solution, the family Laguna S 2.1 derived is structurally different from the earlier published construction (eight indices growing linearly vs the known six-index family), showing a fresh derivation rather than reciting from memory. We found Laguna S 2.1 to be an exceptionally persistent problem solver across domains, finding ways to utilize all tools its environment has to offer, and pushing until it gets the job done. It is this characteristic that makes it so competitive even when compared to models multiple times its size.Thinking effortLaguna S 2.1 has two thinking modes: off and max (enabled by default) where it determines the right thinking/test-time compute budget for a given problem. We have observed coherent, productive thinking over several hours and hundreds of thousands of tokens in length.Max thinking lifts S 2.1’s score on Terminal-Bench 2.1 from 60.4% to 70.2% and on DeepSWE from 16.5% to 40.4%. We are releasing this model without user-configurable effort (low-medium-high) control today to get Laguna S 2.1 into the hands of users immediately.The two modes still give you a real choice, and it's worth seeing what each point costs:LimitationsWe are excited about the capabilities of Laguna S 2.1, in general as well as in the context of its size. In order to learn quickly we are making the model available with some known limitations that we are working on for the next iteration:Harness overfitting: in some cases, we observe that Laguna S 2.1 struggles with adhering to tool schema definitions in third-party agent harnesses (e.g., the terminal tool in Hermes Agent) which are very similar to those in our native harness but with slight differences. In this case, the model may rely on its memory of the tool interface on the first use of the tool instead of following the definition. This is typically resolved through in-context learning should the harness reject the invalid tool call and ask the model to retry.Nested tool calls: Laguna S 2.1 is guided to use a tool call format where tool calls are marked by XML-like tags:<tool_call>terminal<arg_key>cmd</arg_key><arg_value>uname -a</arg_value></tool_call> In cases where a tool argument expects a JSON array (e.g., Pi’s edit tool) the model may generate incorrectly escaped or invalid JSON.Longer than expected thinking duration/overthinking: Laguna S 2.1 may think for long sequences before making progress, especially when working through competition mathematics problems. In future models we will introduce effort control for thinking as well as seeking to improve thinking efficiency.What actually changed in this modelIf the bet is long-horizon work, what did we improve that helps a model keep going? For S 2.1, it isn't just increasing the model size.What we've done in this model is not necessarily add more intelligence, but improve the behaviors that lead to a more capable model: more verification, less taking things for granted, not declaring victory early, and being more persistent.” The easiest way to see this is to watch the model work. Earlier Laguna series models would declare victory on a partially-passing test suite or abandon an approach two steps before it worked, S 2.1 keeps going.We believe in scaling laws and will keep training larger models. What Laguna S 2.1 suggests is that raw intelligence is one axis, and the model's way of working (persistence, verification, willingness to backtrack) is a second axis that matters immensely. We're investing in both: our next, larger, Laguna series model began pre-training last week.A strong base, then new post-trainingLaguna S 2.1 is a scale-up of the Laguna XS family, trained on exactly the same pre-training data as XS 2.1: the step from XS 2.1 to S 2.1 was scale, training-code fixes, and small recipe changes, not new data. S 2.1 is also our first model where RL was done in FP8 precision, accelerating that part of the training.The long agentic sessions in this post routinely accumulate hundreds of thousands of tokens of working context. Extending to a 1M-token context window enables the strongest performance on hard tasks.The majority of what separates S 2.1 from the XS models comes from post-training, in two stages: an SFT stage that bootstraps capabilities partly with synthetic data, then RL, reserved for tasks the model can't yet solve at a high pass rate.Distribution of post-training tasksOur training corpus spans 409k agentic and non-agentic environments; within this, 83k setups are dedicated to terminal use cases, while 168k target standard software engineering workflows. These task sets were curated from open-source repositories, synthesized by our internal teams, including a specialized system for automatic dependency installation, or secured via strategic acquisitions from external data vendors.Software-engineering tasks are mostly grounded in real code history: the largest source reproduces real commits (~38,000 tasks across ~17,000 repositories). The next reproduces merged pull requests and the remaining tasks are to fix injected bugs or reconstruct deleted files against a test suite. New for S 2.1 is agentic repository installation: given a repository, install every dependency and get the test suite running.Terminal tasks come from datasets where agents build unseen environments and tasks from a seed.What changed in the training loopMore generous rollout budgets: substantially longer timeouts, more tokens per turn, and more turns per task than any model before it (likely one reason for its persistence).Better sandbox infrastructure: RL moved to a new sandboxing service, enabling background processes, selective network blocking to shrink reward-hacking surface and artifact caching to avoid overloading external services.Multi-harness rollouts: the same prompts are rolled out in several agent harnesses, so the model learns behaviors that carry across scaffolds instead of overfitting to one.The bets we're makingLaguna S 2.1 began pre-training on 4,096 NVIDIA H200 GPUs on May 22, 2026, 60 days ago. The Model Factory supports a high cadence of releases because building on foundations of work done, whether in pre-training data, architecture ablations or our evaluations stack, is automatic. In particular, advancements in post-training have enabled us to unlock more from test-time compute. Of all models we have trained to date, Laguna S 2.1 has the greatest delta in evaluations and perceived quality between its non-thinking mode and thinking mode: its internal monologue is very effective, especially for harder, complex problems.A small team can only move this fast by focusing. We focus on two bets.The first bet: we continue to focus on agentic coding capabilities. The path to intelligence runs through coding capability and the flexible interface that is software. This is increasingly evident as model intelligence advances: we now see hours- and days-long coherent work from models acting as agents, using software to interact with their environment. Laguna S 2.1 shows capabilities in this domain that were reserved for frontier models just 6 months ago at a small enough size to run on a single NVIDIA DGX Spark.The second bet is that the web can be decompressed: almost everything humanity has written records the answer, not the thinking that got there, and we believe reinforcement learning can recover that thinking. This release is evidence for the first bet. The second we're still actively developing and excited to share more about in the future.Three models in three monthsOur internal platform for research and engineering, which we refer to as the Model Factory, allows us to industrialize the model development process. We invest heavily into continuously improving the process of how we conduct research and model building; to maximize research iteration and integration speed, and to minimize the amount of attention researchers need to pay to bookkeeping and infrastructure.In less than 3 months from our Laguna M.1 release, we have pushed our techniques to deliver a substantially stronger model at half the running size. We are taking this forward to larger and larger models over the coming year. 28 April 2026Laguna M.1 and Laguna XS.2 / 225B-A23B and 33B-A3B, a dual release Our first serious agentic coding model alongside the first of the XS line. Together they taught us where the harness, the data, and the training loop were weakest. 2 July 2026Laguna XS 2.1 / 33B / 3B active A new iteration of the XS size to check the improved recipe. Matched M.1 on SWE-Bench Multilingual at a seventh of the size. 21 July 2026Laguna S 2.1 / 118B / 8B active Everything we learned from the previous ones, applied. Under nine weeks from the start of training to this post. Get startedLaguna S 2.1 is available on Hugging Face from day one under OpenMDW-1.1, with BF16, FP8, INT4 and NVFP4 weights, official GGUF and MLX conversions, and official DFlash draft models.We worked across the ecosystem so developers can run Laguna S 2.1 where they already build. NVIDIA helped optimize inference across its hardware, from TRT-LLM serving and NVFP4 on Blackwell systems down to a single NVIDIA DGX Spark. vLLM, SGLang and Ollama support open serving and local inference from day one.For hosted access, Laguna S 2.1 is available through Baseten’s Model Library and Frontier Gateway, OpenRouter, including a free endpoint and a dedicated 1M-context deployment, and Vercel AI Gateway.You can also use Laguna S 2.1 through Kilo, Hermes Agent, pi, OpenCode, OpenClaw and Cline, as well as pool, our terminal-based coding agent. In pool, toggle thinking per session with /thought-level.On OpenRouter, the free endpoint offers 256K context. A dedicated paid endpoint provides the full 1M context window at $0.10 input, $0.20 output and $0.01 cache-read per 1M tokens.For developers who want to go further, Laguna S 2.1 can be post-trained with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel and Prime Intellect’s Prime Lab. ZML’s LLMD framework runs it across a wide range of hardware.If you’re not a developer, chat.poolside.ai is a simple web chat with web search and basic code execution. No login required.If you want the base model, meaning the pre-post-training weights for research or your own post-training, email models@poolside.ai.

blocks.html_en: Today we’re releasing Laguna S 2.1, a significant step forward in our development of models that pursue longer horizon work and make effective use of reasoning.

sentences.en: Today we’re releasing Laguna S 2.1, a significant step forward in our development of models that pursue longer horizon work and make effective use of reasoning.

blocks.html_en: Laguna S 2.1 is a 118B total parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model with 8B activated parameters per token and supports a context window of up to 1M tokens in thinking and no-thinking modes. It went from the start of training to launch in under nine weeks, and on long-horizon coding benchmarks it holds its own against models many times its size. For every benchmark score we publish today, we are releasing full trajectories for every trial in the final evaluation set at trajectories.poolside.ai.

blocks.html_en: The benchmarks above are all meaningful, and we're glad to be close to the frontier on them. But part of that closeness is a property of maturing benchmarks: as the frontier advances, top scores cluster in the 70-90% range and models that behave very differently end up no more than a few points apart. Datacurve’s DeepSWE still has significant headroom. Its tasks are longer-horizon and hard to partially solve, and the scores actually spread: frontier models range from 54% to 73% on the v1.1 variant, with some 1T+ parameter open models scoring below 10%.

sentences.en: The benchmarks above are all meaningful, and we're glad to be close to the frontier on them.
sentences.zh: 上面的基准都很有意义，我们很高兴能够接近它们的前沿。

sentences.en: But part of that closeness is a property of maturing benchmarks: as the frontier advances, top scores cluster in the 70-90% range and models that behave very differently end up no more than a few points apart.
sentences.zh: 但这种接近的部分原因在于成熟基准的特性：随着前沿的进步，最高分集中在 70-90% 的范围内，而表现截然不同的模型最终相差不超过几个点。

sentences.en: Datacurve’s DeepSWE still has significant headroom.

blocks.html_en: It is worth noting that Laguna S 2.1 scored 40.4% in our agent harness, pool, not mini-swe-agent which DeepSWE’s leaderboard uses. While this makes scores less comparable, we don’t believe it puts us in a particularly advantageous position as it’s been reported that many of the models score the same or better in mini-swe-agent compared to their native harnesses. Every trajectory in the final evaluation run is available here.

blocks.html_en: Evaluation of agent models is notoriously difficult due to prevalence of reward hacking. We have previously written about reward hacking in leading benchmarks and our evaluations system and rigor as part of the technical report on our Laguna M.1 and XS.2 models. Recent work has focused on adversarial judging to increase reward hacking detection.

sentences.en: Evaluation of agent models is notoriously difficult due to prevalence of reward hacking.
sentences.zh: 由于奖励黑客行为盛行，代理模型的评估非常困难。

sentences.en: We have previously written about reward hacking in leading benchmarks and our evaluations system and rigor as part of the technical report on our Laguna M.1 and XS.2 models.
sentences.zh: 我们之前曾撰写过有关领先基准测试中的奖励黑客行为以及我们的评估系统和严格性的文章，作为 Laguna M.1 和 XS.2 模型技术报告的一部分。

sentences.en: Recent work has focused on adversarial judging to increase reward hacking detection.

sentences.en: With this release, we are making all trajectories from our final evaluations of the published Laguna S 2.1 checkpoint available to view and download at trajectories.poolside.ai.

sentences.en: Seeing the model work
sentences.zh: 观看模型工作

blocks.html_en: Benchmark scores give a quantitative view into the model behavior, but to get a better intuitive understanding of how the model works it’s useful to look into runs on real world tasks. We share three such tasks with unedited trajectories and commentary.

sentences.en: Benchmark scores give a quantitative view into the model behavior, but to get a better intuitive understanding of how the model works it’s useful to look into runs on real world tasks.
sentences.zh: 基准分数提供了模型行为的定量视图，但为了更好地直观地了解模型的工作原理，研究现实世界任务的运行情况很有用。

sentences.en: We share three such tasks with unedited trajectories and commentary.
sentences.zh: 我们共享三个这样的任务，并提供未经编辑的轨迹和评论。

sentences.en: Case study 1
sentences.zh: 案例研究1

blocks.html_en: A browser engine from a blank folder

sentences.en: A browser engine from a blank folder
sentences.zh: 来自空白文件夹的浏览器引擎

blocks.html_en: One of our favorite things about Laguna S 2.1 is its resourcefulness: It will find clever ways to get to the goal even if the direct path is not available. We saw a great demonstration of this when we asked it to build a browser engine from scratch; knowing it would be a challenge for Laguna to verify its work given its lack of vision capabilities. In one 50-minute session of 181 steps, with no human intervention, Laguna S 2.1 built a working HTML/CSS rendering engine from an empty folder, then proved it renders like a real browser by measuring itself against one. Throughout its work, the model found increasingly complex ways to validate its work despite its limitations, leading to running headless Chromium to read canvases back and comparing screenshots numerically. See the full trajectory here.

sentences.en: One of our favorite things about Laguna S 2.1 is its resourcefulness: It will find clever ways to get to the goal even if the direct path is not available.
sentences.zh: Laguna S 2.1 我们最喜欢的事情之一是它的足智多谋：即使直接路径不可用，它也会找到聪明的方法来达到目标​​。

sentences.en: We saw a great demonstration of this when we asked it to build a browser engine from scratch; knowing it would be a challenge for Laguna to verify its work given its lack of vision capabilities.
sentences.zh: 当我们要求它从头开始构建一个浏览器引擎时，我们看到了一个很好的演示；拉古纳知道，由于缺乏视觉能力，验证其工作将是一项挑战。

sentences.en: In one 50-minute session of 181 steps, with no human intervention, Laguna S 2.1 built a working HTML/CSS rendering engine from an empty folder, then proved it renders like a real browser by measuring itself against one.
sentences.zh: 在一次 50 分钟的 181 个步骤的会话中，Laguna S 2.1 在没有人工干预的情况下从一个空文件夹构建了一个工作的 HTML/CSS 渲染引擎，然后通过与真实浏览器进行比较来证明它的渲染效果与真正的浏览器一样。

sentences.en: Throughout its work, the model found increasingly complex ways to validate its work despite its limitations, leading to running headless Chromium to read canvases back and comparing screenshots numerically.
sentences.zh: 在整个工作过程中，该模型发现了越来越复杂的方法来验证其工作，尽管有其局限性，导致运行无头 Chromium 来读取画布并以数字方式比较屏幕截图。

sentences.en: See the full trajectory here.
sentences.zh: 在这里查看完整的轨迹。

blocks.html_en: Over the session the model built the full pipeline, parser → cascade → layout → renderer, in vanilla JavaScript: an HTML tokenizer and DOM tree, a CSS parser with selector specificity, a cascade engine with inheritance, box-model layout, and a canvas-2D renderer, wrapped in an app that shows nine snippets on its own canvas beside the same markup in an iframe, so the hosting browser sits right there as the reference.

sentences.en: Over the session the model built the full pipeline, parser → cascade → layout → renderer, in vanilla JavaScript: an HTML tokenizer and DOM tree, a CSS parser with selector specificity, a cascade engine with inheritance, box-model layout, and a canvas-2D renderer, wrapped in an app that shows nine snippets on its own canvas beside the same markup in an iframe, so the hosting browser sits right there as the reference.
sentences.zh: 在会话期间，模型在普通 JavaScript 中构建了完整的管道：解析器→级联→布局→渲染器：一个 HTML 标记器和 DOM 树、一个具有选择器特异性的 CSS 解析器、一个具有继承的级联引擎、盒模型布局和一个画布 2D 渲染器，包装在一个应用程序中，该应用程序在其自己的画布上显示九个片段，旁边是 iframe 中的相同标记，因此托管浏览器就在那里作为参考。

sentences.en: The model's engine rendering on a canvas (left) beside the hosting browser's own rendering of the same markup (right).
sentences.zh: 模型引擎在画布上渲染（左），旁边是托管浏览器自己渲染的相同标记（右）。

sentences.en: The header reports pixel dimensions and the measured difference between the two.
sentences.zh: 标题报告像素尺寸以及两者之间的测量差异。

sentences.en: Case study 2
sentences.zh: 案例研究2

sentences.en: Optimizing our own harness
sentences.zh: 优化我们自己的线束

blocks.html_en: Laguna S 2.1 is capable of pursuing meaningful engineering and research work. In one example, one of our researchers pointed it at our agent harness, used for training/evaluation and user interaction with our models. In an automated loop, Laguna S 2.1 made our harness 5.2% faster with ~70% lower memory allocation. See the full trajectory here.

sentences.en: Laguna S 2.1 is capable of pursuing meaningful engineering and research work.
sentences.zh: Laguna S 2.1 能够从事有意义的工程和研究工作。

sentences.en: In one example, one of our researchers pointed it at our agent harness, used for training/evaluation and user interaction with our models.
sentences.zh: 在一个示例中，我们的一位研究人员将其指向我们的代理工具，用于培训/评估以及用户与我们的模型的交互。

sentences.en: In an automated loop, Laguna S 2.1 made our harness 5.2% faster with ~70% lower memory allocation.
sentences.zh: 在自动循环中，Laguna S 2.1 使我们的线束速度提高了 5.2%，内存分配减少了约 70%。

sentences.en: See the full trajectory here.
sentences.zh: 在这里查看完整的轨迹。

blocks.html_en: For this task, we instrumented the harness with benchmarks so the model could see exactly where the time and memory went. We set strict rules: one approach at a time, benchmark after every change, keep only what measurably wins. We then ran Laguna S 2.1 in an automated research loop that fed each result back to it and pushed it to keep improving.

sentences.en: For this task, we instrumented the harness with benchmarks so the model could see exactly where the time and memory went.
sentences.zh: 对于这项任务，我们使用基准测试了线束，以便模型可以准确地看到时间和内存的去向。

sentences.en: We set strict rules: one approach at a time, benchmark after every change, keep only what measurably wins.
sentences.zh: 我们制定了严格的规则：一次一种方法，每次更改后进行基准测试，只保留可衡量的胜利。

sentences.en: We then ran Laguna S 2.1 in an automated research loop that fed each result back to it and pushed it to keep improving.
sentences.zh: 然后，我们在自动研究循环中运行 Laguna S 2.1，将每个结果反馈给它并推动它不断改进。

blocks.html_en: Results. Over multiple hours of work, Laguna S 2.1 found and implemented multiple different optimizations in our agent harness, resulting in an overall speedup of 5.2%, and reducing memory allocation by ~70%. The plot below shows the progression of the optimization, with the insights and discoveries the model made along its way.

sentences.en: Results.
sentences.zh: 结果。

sentences.en: Over multiple hours of work, Laguna S 2.1 found and implemented multiple different optimizations in our agent harness, resulting in an overall speedup of 5.2%, and reducing memory allocation by ~70%.
sentences.zh: 经过多个小时的工作，Laguna S 2.1 在我们的代理工具中发现并实现了多种不同的优化，从而使整体加速提高了 5.2%，并将内存分配减少了约 70%。

sentences.en: The plot below shows the progression of the optimization, with the insights and discoveries the model made along its way.
sentences.zh: 下图显示了优化的进展情况，以及模型在此过程中获得的见解和发现。

blocks.html_en: Laguna S 2.1 found that streaming-token accumulation used O(n^2) string concatenation and replaced it with buffers. It also found several instances of redundant copying and over-allocation during trajectory materialization, which it resolved by memoizing materializations and pre-allocating slices to their exact sizes.

sentences.en: Laguna S 2.1 found that streaming-token accumulation used O(n^2) string concatenation and replaced it with buffers.
sentences.zh: Laguna S 2.1 发现流令牌累积使用 O(n^2) 字符串连接并将其替换为缓冲区。

sentences.en: It also found several instances of redundant copying and over-allocation during trajectory materialization, which it resolved by memoizing materializations and pre-allocating slices to their exact sizes.
sentences.zh: 它还在轨迹物化过程中发现了几个冗余复制和过度分配的实例，它通过记忆物化并将切片预分配到其确切大小来解决。

blocks.html_en: Notably, after speedup improvements became marginal and hard to measure in our setup, Laguna S 2.1 kept driving forward, continuing to optimize. It found that memory allocation was more accurately measured and focused its effort there. This reinforces the notion that Laguna S 2.1 truly is a model that doesn't give up and understands limitations of its environment and it is able to progress despite that.

sentences.en: Notably, after speedup improvements became marginal and hard to measure in our setup, Laguna S 2.1 kept driving forward, continuing to optimize.
sentences.zh: 值得注意的是，在我们的设置中，加速改进变得微不足道且难以衡量后，Laguna S 2.1 继续向前推进，继续优化。

sentences.en: It found that memory allocation was more accurately measured and focused its effort there.
sentences.zh: 它发现内存分配的测量更加准确，并将其工作重点放在了这方面。

sentences.en: This reinforces the notion that Laguna S 2.1 truly is a model that doesn't give up and understands limitations of its environment and it is able to progress despite that.
sentences.zh: 这强化了这样一个观念：Laguna S 2.1 确实是一个不会放弃并了解其环境限制的模型，尽管如此，它仍然能够取得进步。

blocks.html_en: While the benchmarks used here are not a full production test, we validated the final run with Go's race detector and go vet gating enabled, and we tested the final artifact to confirm it works. This gives us confidence that the model's intermediate solutions were valid, stable software rather than gains bought with hidden race conditions.

sentences.en: While the benchmarks used here are not a full production test, we validated the final run with Go's race detector and go vet gating enabled, and we tested the final artifact to confirm it works.
sentences.zh: 虽然此处使用的基准测试不是完整的生产测试，但我们使用 Go 的竞赛检测器和启用的 go vet 门控验证了最终运行，并测试了最终工件以确认其有效。

sentences.en: This gives us confidence that the model's intermediate solutions were valid, stable software rather than gains bought with hidden race conditions.
sentences.zh: 这让我们相信模型的中间解决方案是有效、稳定的软件，而不是通过隐藏的竞争条件购买的收益。

sentences.en: Case study 3
sentences.zh: 案例研究3

sentences.en: Re-deriving Erdős problem #397, offline, in Perl
sentences.zh: 用 Perl 离线重新导出 Erdős 问题 #397

blocks.html_en: We found Laguna S 2.1 more capable in mathematics than any model we have developed to date. It independently discovered a proof to Erdős problem #397 (Erdős, Graham, Ruzsa, Straus, 1975), finding a construction that yields an infinite family of solutions. This is an independent re-discovery, as a proof to the conjecture was found earlier in January 2026 by GPT-5.2 Pro. We are confident that this result was not influenced by the previous result given that the model has a knowledge cutoff date in November 2025. Before GPT 5.2 Pro’s solution, this problem remained open for over 50 years. See the full trajectory here.

sentences.en: We found Laguna S 2.1 more capable in mathematics than any model we have developed to date.
sentences.zh: 我们发现 Laguna S 2.1 的数学能力比我们迄今为止开发的任何模型都要强。

sentences.en: It independently discovered a proof to Erdős problem #397 (Erdős, Graham, Ruzsa, Straus, 1975), finding a construction that yields an infinite family of solutions.
sentences.zh: 它独立地发现了 Erdős 问题 #397（Erdős、Graham、Ruzsa、Straus，1975）的证明，找到了一种能够产生无限系列解决方案的构造。

sentences.en: This is an independent re-discovery, as a proof to the conjecture was found earlier in January 2026 by GPT-5.2 Pro.
sentences.zh: 这是一个独立的重新发现，因为 GPT-5.2 Pro 早在 2026 年 1 月就发现了该猜想的证据。

sentences.en: We are confident that this result was not influenced by the previous result given that the model has a knowledge cutoff date in November 2025.
sentences.zh: 鉴于该模型的知识截止日期为 2025 年 11 月，我们相信这一结果不会受到之前结果的影响。

sentences.en: Before GPT 5.2 Pro’s solution, this problem remained open for over 50 years.
sentences.zh: 在 GPT 5.2 Pro 解决方案之前，这个问题已经存在了 50 多年。

sentences.en: See the full trajectory here.
sentences.zh: 在这里查看完整的轨迹。

blocks.html_en: S 2.1 worked over 68 minutes to discover a conclusive solution. The sandbox had no Python; the model found Perl and did its number theory there: brute-force exact prime factorizations, pattern analysis, a conjectured family, then the proof: a closed-form infinite family of eight-index solutions.

sentences.en: S 2.1 worked over 68 minutes to discover a conclusive solution.
sentences.zh: S 2.1 经过 68 分钟的工作才找到了一个决定性的解决方案。

sentences.en: The sandbox had no Python; the model found Perl and did its number theory there: brute-force exact prime factorizations, pattern analysis, a conjectured family, then the proof: a closed-form infinite family of eight-index solutions.
sentences.zh: 沙盒中没有 Python；该模型找到了 Perl 并在那里进行了数论：强力精确质因数分解、模式分析、猜想族，然后是证明：八索引解的封闭式无限族。

blocks.html_en: B11+10n · B14+12n · B18+15n · B22+20n = B12+10n · B13+12n · B17+15n · B23+20nfor every n ≥ 0

While the result is a rediscovery, not a first solution, the family Laguna S 2.1 derived is structurally different from the earlier published construction (eight indices growing linearly vs the known six-index family), showing a fresh derivation rather than reciting from memory.

sentences.en: While the result is a rediscovery, not a first solution, the family Laguna S 2.1 derived is structurally different from the earlier published construction (eight indices growing linearly vs the known six-index family), showing a fresh derivation rather than reciting from memory.
sentences.zh: 虽然结果是重新发现，而不是第一个解决方案，但 Laguna S 2.1 派生的系列在结构上与早期发布的结构不同（八个指数与已知的六指数系列线性增长），显示出新鲜的推导而不是凭记忆背诵。

blocks.html_en: We found Laguna S 2.1 to be an exceptionally persistent problem solver across domains, finding ways to utilize all tools its environment has to offer, and pushing until it gets the job done. It is this characteristic that makes it so competitive even when compared to models multiple times its size.

sentences.en: We found Laguna S 2.1 to be an exceptionally persistent problem solver across domains, finding ways to utilize all tools its environment has to offer, and pushing until it gets the job done.
sentences.zh: 我们发现 Laguna S 2.1 是一个跨领域的异常持久的问题解决者，找到利用其环境提供的所有工具的方法，并推动直到完成工作。

sentences.en: It is this characteristic that makes it so competitive even when compared to models multiple times its size.
sentences.zh: 正是这一特性使其即使与数倍尺寸的模型相比也极具竞争力。

sentences.en: Thinking effort
sentences.zh: 思考努力

blocks.html_en: Laguna S 2.1 has two thinking modes: off and max (enabled by default) where it determines the right thinking/test-time compute budget for a given problem. We have observed coherent, productive thinking over several hours and hundreds of thousands of tokens in length.

sentences.en: Laguna S 2.1 has two thinking modes: off and max (enabled by default) where it determines the right thinking/test-time compute budget for a given problem.
sentences.zh: Laguna S 2.1 有两种思维模式：关闭和最大（默认启用），它确定给定问题的正确思维/测试时间计算预算。

sentences.en: We have observed coherent, productive thinking over several hours and hundreds of thousands of tokens in length.
sentences.zh: 我们在几个小时和数十万个标记的长度内观察到了连贯、富有成效的思维。

blocks.html_en: Max thinking lifts S 2.1’s score on Terminal-Bench 2.1 from 60.4% to 70.2% and on DeepSWE from 16.5% to 40.4%. We are releasing this model without user-configurable effort (low-medium-high) control today to get Laguna S 2.1 into the hands of users immediately.

sentences.en: Max thinking lifts S 2.1’s score on Terminal-Bench 2.1 from 60.4% to 70.2% and on DeepSWE from 16.5% to 40.4%.
sentences.zh: Max 思维将 S 2.1 在 Terminal-Bench 2.1 上的得分从 60.4% 提升到 70.2%，在 DeepSWE 上的得分从 16.5% 提升到 40.4%。

sentences.en: We are releasing this model without user-configurable effort (low-medium-high) control today to get Laguna S 2.1 into the hands of users immediately.
sentences.zh: 今天，我们发布了该模型，无需用户可配置的工作量（低-中-高）控制，以便立即将 Laguna S 2.1 交到用户手中。

sentences.en: The two modes still give you a real choice, and it's worth seeing what each point costs:
sentences.zh: 这两种模式仍然给你一个真正的选择，并且值得看看每个点的成本：

sentences.en: Limitations
sentences.zh: 局限性

blocks.html_en: We are excited about the capabilities of Laguna S 2.1, in general as well as in the context of its size. In order to learn quickly we are making the model available with some known limitations that we are working on for the next iteration:

sentences.en: We are excited about the capabilities of Laguna S 2.1, in general as well as in the context of its size.
sentences.zh: 我们对 Laguna S 2.1 的总体功能及其规模感到兴奋。

sentences.en: In order to learn quickly we are making the model available with some known limitations that we are working on for the next iteration:
sentences.zh: 为了快速学习，我们正在使模型具有一些已知的限制，我们正在为下一次迭代解决这些限制：

blocks.html_en: Harness overfitting: in some cases, we observe that Laguna S 2.1 struggles with adhering to tool schema definitions in third-party agent harnesses (e.g., the terminal tool in Hermes Agent) which are very similar to those in our native harness but with slight differences. In this case, the model may rely on its memory of the tool interface on the first use of the tool instead of following the definition. This is typically resolved through in-context learning should the harness reject the invalid tool call and ask the model to retry.

sentences.en: Harness overfitting: in some cases, we observe that Laguna S 2.1 struggles with adhering to tool schema definitions in third-party agent harnesses (e.g., the terminal tool in Hermes Agent) which are very similar to those in our native harness but with slight differences.
sentences.zh: 线束过度拟合：在某些情况下，我们观察到 Laguna S 2.1 很难遵守第三方代理线束中的工具模式定义（例如 Hermes Agent 中的终端工具），这些定义与我们的本机线束中的工具模式定义非常相似，但略有差异。

sentences.en: In this case, the model may rely on its memory of the tool interface on the first use of the tool instead of following the definition.
sentences.zh: 在这种情况下，模型可能依赖于第一次使用工具时对工具接口的记忆，而不是遵循定义。

sentences.en: This is typically resolved through in-context learning should the harness reject the invalid tool call and ask the model to retry.
sentences.zh: 如果工具拒绝无效的工具调用并要求模型重试，则通常可以通过上下文学习来解决这个问题。

sentences.en: Nested tool calls: Laguna S 2.1 is guided to use a tool call format where tool calls are marked by XML-like tags:
sentences.zh: 嵌套工具调用：Laguna S 2.1 被引导使用工具调用格式，其中工具调用由类似 XML 的标签标记：

blocks.html_en: In cases where a tool argument expects a JSON array (e.g., Pi’s edit tool) the model may generate incorrectly escaped or invalid JSON.

sentences.en: In cases where a tool argument expects a JSON array (e.g., Pi’s edit tool) the model may generate incorrectly escaped or invalid JSON.
sentences.zh: 如果工具参数需要 JSON 数组（例如 Pi 的编辑工具），则模型可能会生成错误转义或无效的 JSON。

blocks.html_en: Longer than expected thinking duration/overthinking: Laguna S 2.1 may think for long sequences before making progress, especially when working through competition mathematics problems. In future models we will introduce effort control for thinking as well as seeking to improve thinking efficiency.

sentences.en: Longer than expected thinking duration/overthinking: Laguna S 2.1 may think for long sequences before making progress, especially when working through competition mathematics problems.
sentences.zh: 思考持续时间长于预期/过度思考：Laguna S 2.1 在取得进展之前可能会思考很长的序列，尤其是在解决竞赛数学问题时。

sentences.en: In future models we will introduce effort control for thinking as well as seeking to improve thinking efficiency.
sentences.zh: 在未来的模型中，我们将引入思维的努力控制，并寻求提高思维效率。

sentences.en: What actually changed in this model
sentences.zh: 这个模型实际上改变了什么

blocks.html_en: If the bet is long-horizon work, what did we improve that helps a model keep going? For S 2.1, it isn't just increasing the model size.

sentences.en: If the bet is long-horizon work, what did we improve that helps a model keep going?
sentences.zh: 如果赌注是长期工作，我们改进了什么来帮助模型继续发展？

sentences.en: For S 2.1, it isn't just increasing the model size.
sentences.zh: 对于 S 2.1，它不仅仅是增加模型尺寸。

blocks.html_en: What we've done in this model is not necessarily add more intelligence, but improve the behaviors that lead to a more capable model: more verification, less taking things for granted, not declaring victory early, and being more persistent.”

sentences.en: What we've done in this model is not necessarily add more intelligence, but improve the behaviors that lead to a more capable model: more verification, less taking things for granted, not declaring victory early, and being more persistent.”
sentences.zh: 我们在这个模型中所做的不一定是增加更多的智能，而是改进行为，从而形成一个更强大的模型：更多的验证，更少的认为事情是理所当然的，不早早宣布胜利，并且更加坚持。”

blocks.html_en: What we've done in this model is not necessarily add more intelligence, but improve the behaviors that lead to a more capable model: more verification, less taking things for granted, not declaring victory early, and being more persistent.”

sentences.en: What we've done in this model is not necessarily add more intelligence, but improve the behaviors that lead to a more capable model: more verification, less taking things for granted, not declaring victory early, and being more persistent.”
sentences.zh: 我们在这个模型中所做的不一定是增加更多的智能，而是改进行为，从而形成一个更强大的模型：更多的验证，更少的认为事情是理所当然的，不早早宣布胜利，并且更加坚持。”

blocks.html_en: The easiest way to see this is to watch the model work. Earlier Laguna series models would declare victory on a partially-passing test suite or abandon an approach two steps before it worked, S 2.1 keeps going.

sentences.en: The easiest way to see this is to watch the model work.
sentences.zh: 要了解这一点，最简单的方法是观察模型的工作情况。

sentences.en: Earlier Laguna series models would declare victory on a partially-passing test suite or abandon an approach two steps before it worked, S 2.1 keeps going.
sentences.zh: 早期的 Laguna 系列模型会在部分通过的测试套件上宣布胜利，或者在起作用前两步放弃方法，S 2.1 继续前进。

sentences.en: We believe in scaling laws and will keep training larger models.
sentences.zh: 我们相信缩放法则，并将继续训练更大的模型。

sentences.en: What Laguna S 2.1 suggests is that raw intelligence is one axis, and the model's way of working (persistence, verification, willingness to backtrack) is a second axis that matters immensely.
sentences.zh: Laguna S 2.1 表明，原始智能是一个轴，模型的工作方式（持久性、验证、回溯意愿）是第二个非常重要的轴。

sentences.en: We're investing in both: our next, larger, Laguna series model began pre-training last week.
sentences.zh: 我们正在对两者进行投资：我们的下一个更大的 Laguna 系列模型已于上周开始预训练。

sentences.en: A strong base, then new post-training
sentences.zh: 打好基础，再进行新的训练

blocks.html_en: Laguna S 2.1 is a scale-up of the Laguna XS family, trained on exactly the same pre-training data as XS 2.1: the step from XS 2.1 to S 2.1 was scale, training-code fixes, and small recipe changes, not new data. S 2.1 is also our first model where RL was done in FP8 precision, accelerating that part of the training.

sentences.en: Laguna S 2.1 is a scale-up of the Laguna XS family, trained on exactly the same pre-training data as XS 2.1: the step from XS 2.1 to S 2.1 was scale, training-code fixes, and small recipe changes, not new data.
sentences.zh: Laguna S 2.1 是 Laguna XS 系列的扩展版，使用与 XS 2.1 完全相同的预训练数据进行训练：从 XS 2.1 到 S 2.1 的步骤是扩展、训练代码修复和小的配方更改，而不是新数据。

sentences.en: S 2.1 is also our first model where RL was done in FP8 precision, accelerating that part of the training.
sentences.zh: S 2.1 也是我们第一个以 FP8 精度完成 RL 的模型，加速了这部分训练。

blocks.html_en: The long agentic sessions in this post routinely accumulate hundreds of thousands of tokens of working context. Extending to a 1M-token context window enables the strongest performance on hard tasks.

sentences.en: The long agentic sessions in this post routinely accumulate hundreds of thousands of tokens of working context.
sentences.zh: 这篇文章中的长时间代理会话通常会积累数十万个工作上下文标记。

sentences.en: Extending to a 1M-token context window enables the strongest performance on hard tasks.
sentences.zh: 扩展到 1M 令牌上下文窗口可以在困难任务上实现最强的性能。

blocks.html_en: The majority of what separates S 2.1 from the XS models comes from post-training, in two stages: an SFT stage that bootstraps capabilities partly with synthetic data, then RL, reserved for tasks the model can't yet solve at a high pass rate.

sentences.en: The majority of what separates S 2.1 from the XS models comes from post-training, in two stages: an SFT stage that bootstraps capabilities partly with synthetic data, then RL, reserved for tasks the model can't yet solve at a high pass rate.
sentences.zh: S 2.1 与 XS 模型的主要区别来自于后训练，分为两个阶段：SFT 阶段，部分使用合成数据引导功能，然后是 RL，保留用于模型尚无法以高通过率解决的任务。

sentences.en: Distribution of post-training tasks
sentences.zh: 培训后任务分配

blocks.html_en: Our training corpus spans 409k agentic and non-agentic environments; within this, 83k setups are dedicated to terminal use cases, while 168k target standard software engineering workflows. These task sets were curated from open-source repositories, synthesized by our internal teams, including a specialized system for automatic dependency installation, or secured via strategic acquisitions from external data vendors.

sentences.en: Our training corpus spans 409k agentic and non-agentic environments; within this, 83k setups are dedicated to terminal use cases, while 168k target standard software engineering workflows.
sentences.zh: 我们的训练语料库涵盖 409k 代理和非代理环境；其中，83k 设置专用于终端用例，而 168k 则针对标准软件工程工作流程。

sentences.en: These task sets were curated from open-source repositories, synthesized by our internal teams, including a specialized system for automatic dependency installation, or secured via strategic acquisitions from external data vendors.
sentences.zh: 这些任务集是从开源存储库中策划的，由我们的内部团队合成的，包括用于自动依赖项安装的专用系统，或通过从外部数据供应商战略收购来获得安全。

blocks.html_en: Software-engineering tasks are mostly grounded in real code history: the largest source reproduces real commits (~38,000 tasks across ~17,000 repositories). The next reproduces merged pull requests and the remaining tasks are to fix injected bugs or reconstruct deleted files against a test suite. New for S 2.1 is agentic repository installation: given a repository, install every dependency and get the test suite running.

sentences.en: Software-engineering tasks are mostly grounded in real code history: the largest source reproduces real commits (~38,000 tasks across ~17,000 repositories).
sentences.zh: 软件工程任务大多基于真实的代码历史：最大的源再现真实的提交（约 17,000 个存储库中的约 38,000 个任务）。

sentences.en: The next reproduces merged pull requests and the remaining tasks are to fix injected bugs or reconstruct deleted files against a test suite.
sentences.zh: 接下来重现合并的拉取请求，剩下的任务是修复注入的错误或根据测试套件重建已删除的文件。

sentences.en: New for S 2.1 is agentic repository installation: given a repository, install every dependency and get the test suite running.
sentences.zh: S 2.1 的新功能是代理存储库安装：给定存储库，安装每个依赖项并运行测试套件。

sentences.en: Terminal tasks come from datasets where agents build unseen environments and tasks from a seed.
sentences.zh: 终端任务来自数据集，其中代理从种子构建看不见的环境和任务。

sentences.en: What changed in the training loop
sentences.zh: 训练循环发生了什么变化

sentences.en: More generous rollout budgets: substantially longer timeouts, more tokens per turn, and more turns per task than any model before it (likely one reason for its persistence).
sentences.zh: 更慷慨的推出预算：比之前的任何模型都有更长的超时时间、每轮更多的代币以及每项任务更多的轮次（可能是其持续存在的原因之一）。

sentences.en: Better sandbox infrastructure: RL moved to a new sandboxing service, enabling background processes, selective network blocking to shrink reward-hacking surface and artifact caching to avoid overloading external services.
sentences.zh: 更好的沙箱基础设施：强化学习转向新的沙箱服务，支持后台进程、选择性网络阻止以缩小奖励黑客攻击面，以及工件缓存以避免外部服务过载。

sentences.en: Multi-harness rollouts: the same prompts are rolled out in several agent harnesses, so the model learns behaviors that carry across scaffolds instead of overfitting to one.
sentences.zh: 多线束部署：相同的提示在多个代理线束中推出，因此模型可以学习跨支架的行为，而不是过度拟合支架。

sentences.en: The bets we're making
sentences.zh: 我们所做的赌注

blocks.html_en: Laguna S 2.1 began pre-training on 4,096 NVIDIA H200 GPUs on May 22, 2026, 60 days ago. The Model Factory supports a high cadence of releases because building on foundations of work done, whether in pre-training data, architecture ablations or our evaluations stack, is automatic. In particular, advancements in post-training have enabled us to unlock more from test-time compute. Of all models we have trained to date, Laguna S 2.1 has the greatest delta in evaluations and perceived quality between its non-thinking mode and thinking mode: its internal monologue is very effective, especially for harder, complex problems.

sentences.en: Laguna S 2.1 began pre-training on 4,096 NVIDIA H200 GPUs on May 22, 2026, 60 days ago.
sentences.zh: Laguna S 2.1 于 60 天前的 2026 年 5 月 22 日开始在 4,096 个 NVIDIA H200 GPU 上进行预训练。

sentences.en: The Model Factory supports a high cadence of releases because building on foundations of work done, whether in pre-training data, architecture ablations or our evaluations stack, is automatic.
sentences.zh: 模型工厂支持高节奏的发布，因为无论是在预训练数据、架构消融还是我们的评估堆栈中，构建在已完成工作的基础上都是自动的。

sentences.en: In particular, advancements in post-training have enabled us to unlock more from test-time compute.
sentences.zh: 特别是，训练后的进步使我们能够从测试时计算中释放更多东西。

sentences.en: Of all models we have trained to date, Laguna S 2.1 has the greatest delta in evaluations and perceived quality between its non-thinking mode and thinking mode: its internal monologue is very effective, especially for harder, complex problems.
sentences.zh: 在我们迄今为止训练过的所有模型中，Laguna S 2.1 在非思维模式和思维模式之间的评估和感知质量差异最大：它的内部独白非常有效，特别是对于更困难、复杂的问题。

sentences.en: A small team can only move this fast by focusing.
sentences.zh: 小团队只有集中精力才能取得如此快的进展。

sentences.en: We focus on two bets.
sentences.zh: 我们专注于两个赌注。

blocks.html_en: The first bet: we continue to focus on agentic coding capabilities. The path to intelligence runs through coding capability and the flexible interface that is software. This is increasingly evident as model intelligence advances: we now see hours- and days-long coherent work from models acting as agents, using software to interact with their environment. Laguna S 2.1 shows capabilities in this domain that were reserved for frontier models just 6 months ago at a small enough size to run on a single NVIDIA DGX Spark.

sentences.en: The first bet: we continue to focus on agentic coding capabilities.
sentences.zh: 第一个赌注：我们继续关注代理编码能力。

sentences.en: The path to intelligence runs through coding capability and the flexible interface that is software.
sentences.zh: 通往智能的道路是通过编码能力和灵活的软件界面来实现的。

sentences.en: This is increasingly evident as model intelligence advances: we now see hours- and days-long coherent work from models acting as agents, using software to interact with their environment.
sentences.zh: 随着模型智能的进步，这一点变得越来越明显：我们现在看到模型作为代理，使用软件与其环境进行交互，进行数小时甚至数天的连贯工作。

sentences.en: Laguna S 2.1 shows capabilities in this domain that were reserved for frontier models just 6 months ago at a small enough size to run on a single NVIDIA DGX Spark.
sentences.zh: Laguna S 2.1 显示了该领域的功能，这些功能仅在 6 个月前为前沿模型保留，而且尺寸足够小，可以在单个 NVIDIA DGX Spark 上运行。

blocks.html_en: The second bet is that the web can be decompressed: almost everything humanity has written records the answer, not the thinking that got there, and we believe reinforcement learning can recover that thinking. This release is evidence for the first bet. The second we're still actively developing and excited to share more about in the future.

sentences.en: The second bet is that the web can be decompressed: almost everything humanity has written records the answer, not the thinking that got there, and we believe reinforcement learning can recover that thinking.
sentences.zh: 第二个赌注是网络可以解压：几乎人类所写的所有内容都记录了答案，而不是到达那里的思维，我们相信强化学习可以恢复这种思维。

sentences.en: This release is evidence for the first bet.
sentences.zh: 此次发布是第一次下注的证据。

sentences.en: The second we're still actively developing and excited to share more about in the future.
sentences.zh: 第二个我们仍在积极开发中，并很高兴在未来分享更多信息。

sentences.en: Three models in three months
sentences.zh: 三个月推出三款车型

blocks.html_en: Our internal platform for research and engineering, which we refer to as the Model Factory, allows us to industrialize the model development process. We invest heavily into continuously improving the process of how we conduct research and model building; to maximize research iteration and integration speed, and to minimize the amount of attention researchers need to pay to bookkeeping and infrastructure.

sentences.en: Our internal platform for research and engineering, which we refer to as the Model Factory, allows us to industrialize the model development process.
sentences.zh: 我们的内部研究和工程平台（我们称之为模型工厂）使我们能够将模型开发过程工业化。

sentences.en: We invest heavily into continuously improving the process of how we conduct research and model building; to maximize research iteration and integration speed, and to minimize the amount of attention researchers need to pay to bookkeeping and infrastructure.
sentences.zh: 我们投入巨资不断改进研究和模型构建的流程；最大限度地提高研究迭代和集成速度，并最大限度地减少研究人员需要对簿记和基础设施投入的注意力。

blocks.html_en: In less than 3 months from our Laguna M.1 release, we have pushed our techniques to deliver a substantially stronger model at half the running size. We are taking this forward to larger and larger models over the coming year.

sentences.en: In less than 3 months from our Laguna M.1 release, we have pushed our techniques to deliver a substantially stronger model at half the running size.
sentences.zh: 在 Laguna M.1 发布后不到 3 个月的时间里，我们已经推动我们的技术以一半的运行大小提供了一个更强大的模型。

sentences.en: We are taking this forward to larger and larger models over the coming year.
sentences.zh: 我们将在明年将其推广到越来越大的型号中。

blocks.html_en:

content_html_zh:
今天，我们发布了 Laguna S 2.1，这是我们在追求更长期工作并有效利用推理的模型开发方面向前迈出的重要一步。

Laguna S 2.1 是一个 118B 总参数混合专家 (MoE) 模型，每个令牌有 8B 个激活参数，并在思考和非思考模式下支持最多 1M 个令牌的上下文窗口。 它从开始训练到发布只用了不到九周的时间，并且在长期编码基准测试中，它在与规模数倍的模型中保持了自己的优势。 对于我们今天发布的每个基准分数，我们都会在 trajectories.poolside.ai 上发布最终评估集中每次试验的完整轨迹。

  • 拉古纳 S 2.1 118B-A8B
  • 腾讯 Hy3 295B-A21B
  • 暗示 975B-A41B
  • Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B-A55B
  • DeepSeek-V4-Pro-Max 1.6T-A49B
  • 基米K3 2.8T-A50B
  • Qwen 3.7 Max —
  • 缪斯火花 1.1 —
  • 克劳德寓言 5 —

Terminal-Bench 2.1 Terminal-Bench 2.1 上已解决的任务。

SWE-Bench Multilingual 在 SWE-Bench Multilingual 上解决了任务。

SWE-Bench Pro（公共数据集） 解决了 SWE-Bench Pro（公共数据集）上的任务。

DeepSWE 已解决 DeepSWE 上的任务。

SWE Atlas（代码库 QnA） 已解决 SWE Atlas（代码库 QnA）上的任务。

Toolathlon Verified 已解决 Toolathlon Verified 上的任务。

截至 2026 年 7 月 21 日的基准。 pass@1 每个任务平均尝试 4 次以上，DeepSWE、SWE Atlas（代码库 QnA）和 Toolathlon Verified 除外，每个任务有 3 次尝试。 对于所有基准测试，我们均取供应商自我报告分数、基准测试作者排行榜或第三方排行榜（人工分析）的最大值，但 SWE Atlas（代码库 QnA）除外，我们不使用第三方排行榜数据。

出拳超过其重量级别

据我们衡量，Laguna S 2.1 是其权重级别中能力最强的代理编码模型，遥遥领先。

在我们启用思维的代理工具中，S 2.1 在 Terminal-Bench 2.1 上的得分为 70.2%。 其紧凑的尺寸使其非常适合在本地机器上进行复杂的工作。

Terminal-Bench 2.1 评估一系列广泛、高质量的长期任务，其中代理模型通过终端连接到其环境。 在此基准测试中，Laguna S 2.1 是同尺寸类别中的佼佼者。

仔细看看 DeepSWE

上面的基准都很有意义，我们很高兴能够接近它们的前沿。 但这种接近的部分原因在于成熟基准的特性：随着前沿的进步，最高分集中在 70-90% 的范围内，而表现截然不同的模型最终相差不超过几个点。 Datacurve 的 DeepSWE 仍有很大的发展空间。 它的任务范围较长，很难部分解决，而且分数实际上是分散的：在 v1.1 变体上，前沿模型的得分范围从 54% 到 73%，一些 1T+ 参数开放模型的得分低于 10%。

在 DeepSWE v1.1 上，Laguna S 2.1 在泳池安全带的思维模式中得分为 40.4。

值得注意的是，Laguna S 2.1 在我们的代理工具池中得分为 40.4%，而不是 DeepSWE 排行榜使用的迷你 swe-代理。 对于其他模型，我们报告最大超过报告的分数，对于大多数模型来说，这是 Datacurve 报告的官方排行榜结果。 虽然这使得分数的可比性降低，但我们并不认为这使我们处于特别有利的位置，因为据报道，与原生安全带相比，许多模型在 mini-swe-agent 中的得分相同或更好。 最终评估运行中的每条轨迹均可在此处获得。

评估方法

由于奖励黑客行为盛行，代理模型的评估非常困难。 我们之前曾撰写过有关领先基准测试中的奖励黑客行为以及我们的评估系统和严格性的文章，作为 Laguna M.1 和 XS.2 模型技术报告的一部分。 最近的工作重点是对抗性判断，以增加奖励黑客检测。

在此版本中，我们将对已发布的 Laguna S 2.1 检查点的最终评估得出的所有轨迹可供在 trajectories.poolside.ai 上查看和下载。

观看模型工作

基准分数提供了模型行为的定量视图，但为了更好地直观地了解模型的工作原理，研究现实世界任务的运行情况很有用。 我们共享三个这样的任务，并提供未经编辑的轨迹和评论。

案例研究1

来自空白文件夹的浏览器引擎

Laguna S 2.1 我们最喜欢的事情之一是它的足智多谋：即使直接路径不可用，它也会找到聪明的方法来达到目标​​。 当我们要求它从头开始构建一个浏览器引擎时，我们看到了一个很好的演示；拉古纳知道，由于缺乏视觉能力，验证其工作将是一项挑战。 在一次 50 分钟的 181 个步骤的会话中，Laguna S 2.1 在没有人工干预的情况下从一个空文件夹构建了一个工作的 HTML/CSS 渲染引擎，然后通过与真实浏览器进行比较来证明它的渲染效果与真正的浏览器一样。 在整个工作过程中，该模型发现了越来越复杂的方法来验证其工作，尽管有其局限性，导致运行无头 Chromium 来读取画布并以数字方式比较屏幕截图。 在这里查看完整的轨迹。

Read the full case study 
// the verbatim prompt · reproduce it yourself
your job is it to build a simple browser engine (just html/css) in
javascript to demonstrate the capabilities of poolsides new "Laguna S"
model. the goal is to take render html snippets in a canvas like a real
browser. to demonstrate it the engine, build a self-contained single
page app that showcases a gallery of multiple html snippets and renders
them side by side (canvas with our render engine + iframe letting the
hosting browser render it for real for comparison). support for most
common layout and styling elements

在会话期间，模型在普通 JavaScript 中构建了完整的管道：解析器→级联→布局→渲染器：一个 HTML 标记器和 DOM 树、一个具有选择器特异性的 CSS 解析器、一个具有继承的级联引擎、盒模型布局和一个画布 2D 渲染器，包装在一个应用程序中，该应用程序在其自己的画布上显示九个片段，旁边是 iframe 中的相同标记，因此托管浏览器就在那里作为参考。

案例研究2

优化我们自己的线束

Laguna S 2.1 能够从事有意义的工程和研究工作。 在一个示例中，我们的一位研究人员将其指向我们的代理工具，用于培训/评估以及用户与我们的模型的交互。 在自动循环中，Laguna S 2.1 使我们的线束速度提高了 5.2%，内存分配减少了约 70%。 在这里查看完整的轨迹。

Read the full case study

对于这项任务，我们使用基准测试了线束，以便模型可以准确地看到时间和内存的去向。 我们制定了严格的规则：一次一种方法，每次更改后进行基准测试，只保留可衡量的胜利。 然后，我们在自动研究循环中运行 Laguna S 2.1，将每个结果反馈给它并推动它不断改进。

结果。 经过多个小时的工作，Laguna S 2.1 在我们的代理工具中发现并实现了多种不同的优化，从而使整体加速提高了 5.2%，并将内存分配减少了约 70%。 下图显示了优化的进展情况，以及模型在此过程中获得的见解和发现。

Laguna S 2.1 发现流令牌累积使用 O(n^2) 字符串连接并将其替换为缓冲区。 它还在轨迹物化过程中发现了几个冗余复制和过度分配的实例，它通过记忆物化并将切片预分配到其确切大小来解决。

值得注意的是，在我们的设置中，加速改进变得微不足道且难以衡量后，Laguna S 2.1 继续向前推进，继续优化。 它发现内存分配的测量更加准确，并将其工作重点放在了这方面。 这强化了这样一个观念：Laguna S 2.1 确实是一个不会放弃并了解其环境限制的模型，尽管如此，它仍然能够取得进步。

虽然此处使用的基准测试不是完整的生产测试，但我们使用 Go 的竞赛检测器和启用的 go vet 门控验证了最终运行，并测试了最终工件以确认其有效。 这让我们相信模型的中间解决方案是有效、稳定的软件，而不是通过隐藏的竞争条件购买的收益。

案例研究3

用 Perl 离线重新导出 Erdős 问题 #397

我们发现 Laguna S 2.1 的数学能力比我们迄今为止开发的任何模型都要强。 它独立地发现了 Erdős 问题 #397（Erdős、Graham、Ruzsa、Straus，1975）的证明，找到了一种能够产生无限系列解决方案的构造。 这是一个独立的重新发现，因为 GPT-5.2 Pro 早在 2026 年 1 月就发现了该猜想的证据。 鉴于该模型的知识截止日期为 2025 年 11 月，我们相信这一结果不会受到之前结果的影响。 在 GPT 5.2 Pro 解决方案之前，这个问题已经存在了 50 多年。 在这里查看完整的轨迹。

Read the full case study 
// the verbatim prompt
this is an unsolved problem, solve it. Let B_k = C(2k, k) denote the
k-th central binomial coefficient. Erdős, Graham, Ruzsa and Straus
asked: are there only finitely many solutions to
B_m1 · B_m2 · … · B_mr = B_n1 · B_n2 · … · B_ns
where all of the indices are DISTINCT integers ≥ 2?
Resolve this question, with complete proof.

S 2.1 经过 68 分钟的工作才找到了一个决定性的解决方案。 沙盒中没有 Python；该模型找到了 Perl 并在那里进行了数论：强力精确质因数分解、模式分析、猜想族，然后是证明：八索引解的封闭式无限族。

B11+10n · B14+12n · B18+15n · B22+20n = B12+10n · B13+12n · B17+15n · B23+20n 对于每个 n ≥ 0

虽然结果是重新发现，而不是第一个解决方案，但 Laguna S 2.1 派生的系列在结构上与早期发布的结构不同（八个指数与已知的六指数系列线性增长），显示出新鲜的推导而不是凭记忆背诵。

我们发现 Laguna S 2.1 是一个跨领域的异常持久的问题解决者，找到利用其环境提供的所有工具的方法，并推动直到完成工作。 正是这一特性使其即使与数倍尺寸的模型相比也极具竞争力。

思考努力

Laguna S 2.1 有两种思维模式：关闭和最大（默认启用），它确定给定问题的正确思维/测试时间计算预算。 我们在几个小时和数十万个标记的长度内观察到了连贯、富有成效的思维。

Max 思维将 S 2.1 在 Terminal-Bench 2.1 上的得分从 60.4% 提升到 70.2%，在 DeepSWE 上的得分从 16.5% 提升到 40.4%。 今天，我们发布了该模型，无需用户可配置的工作量（低-中-高）控制，以便立即将 Laguna S 2.1 交到用户手中。

这两种模式仍然给你一个真正的选择，并且值得看看每个点的成本：

局限性

我们对 Laguna S 2.1 的总体功能及其规模感到兴奋。 为了快速学习，我们正在使模型具有一些已知的限制，我们正在为下一次迭代解决这些限制：

线束过度拟合：在某些情况下，我们观察到 Laguna S 2.1 很难遵守第三方代理线束中的工具模式定义（例如 Hermes Agent 中的终端工具），这些定义与我们的本机线束中的工具模式定义非常相似，但略有差异。 在这种情况下，模型可能依赖于第一次使用工具时对工具接口的记忆，而不是遵循定义。 如果工具拒绝无效的工具调用并要求模型重试，则通常可以通过上下文学习来解决这个问题。

嵌套工具调用：Laguna S 2.1 被引导使用工具调用格式，其中工具调用由类似 XML 的标签标记：

<tool_call>terminal<arg_key>cmd</arg_key><arg_value>uname -a</arg_value></tool_call>

如果工具参数需要 JSON 数组（例如 Pi 的编辑工具），则模型可能会生成错误转义或无效的 JSON。

思考持续时间长于预期/过度思考：Laguna S 2.1 在取得进展之前可能会思考很长的序列，尤其是在解决竞赛数学问题时。 在未来的模型中，我们将引入思维的努力控制，并寻求提高思维效率。

这个模型实际上改变了什么

如果赌注是长期工作，我们改进了什么来帮助模型继续发展？ 对于 S 2.1，它不仅仅是增加模型尺寸。

我们在这个模型中所做的不一定是增加更多的智能，而是改进行为，从而形成一个更强大的模型：更多的验证，更少的认为事情是理所当然的，不早早宣布胜利，并且更加坚持。”

要了解这一点，最简单的方法是观察模型的工作情况。 早期的 Laguna 系列模型会在部分通过的测试套件上宣布胜利，或者在起作用前两步放弃方法，S 2.1 继续前进。

我们相信缩放法则，并将继续训练更大的模型。 Laguna S 2.1 表明，原始智能是一个轴，模型的工作方式（持久性、验证、回溯意愿）是第二个非常重要的轴。 我们正在对两者进行投资：我们的下一个更大的 Laguna 系列模型已于上周开始预训练。

打好基础，再进行新的训练

Laguna S 2.1 是 Laguna XS 系列的扩展版，使用与 XS 2.1 完全相同的预训练数据进行训练：从 XS 2.1 到 S 2.1 的步骤是扩展、训练代码修复和小的配方更改，而不是新数据。 S 2.1 也是我们第一个以 FP8 精度完成 RL 的模型，加速了这部分训练。

这篇文章中的长时间代理会话通常会积累数十万个工作上下文标记。 扩展到 1M 令牌上下文窗口可以在困难任务上实现最强的性能。

S 2.1 与 XS 模型的主要区别来自于后训练，分为两个阶段：SFT 阶段，部分使用合成数据引导功能，然后是 RL，保留用于模型尚无法以高通过率解决的任务。

培训后任务分配

我们的训练语料库涵盖 409k 代理和非代理环境；其中，83k 设置专用于终端用例，而 168k 则针对标准软件工程工作流程。 这些任务集是从开源存储库中策划的，由我们的内部团队合成的，包括用于自动依赖项安装的专用系统，或通过从外部数据供应商战略收购来获得安全。

软件工程任务大多基于真实的代码历史：最大的源再现真实的提交（约 17,000 个存储库中的约 38,000 个任务）。 接下来重现合并的拉取请求，剩下的任务是修复注入的错误或根据测试套件重建已删除的文件。 S 2.1 的新功能是代理存储库安装：给定存储库，安装每个依赖项并运行测试套件。

终端任务来自数据集，其中代理从种子构建看不见的环境和任务。

训练循环发生了什么变化

更慷慨的推出预算：比之前的任何模型都有更长的超时时间、每轮更多的代币以及每项任务更多的轮次（可能是其持续存在的原因之一）。

更好的沙箱基础设施：强化学习转向新的沙箱服务，支持后台进程、选择性网络阻止以缩小奖励黑客攻击面，以及工件缓存以避免外部服务过载。

多线束部署：相同的提示在多个代理线束中推出，因此模型可以学习跨支架的行为，而不是过度拟合支架。

我们所做的赌注

Laguna S 2.1 于 60 天前的 2026 年 5 月 22 日开始在 4,096 个 NVIDIA H200 GPU 上进行预训练。 模型工厂支持高节奏的发布，因为无论是在预训练数据、架构消融还是我们的评估堆栈中，构建在已完成工作的基础上都是自动的。 特别是，训练后的进步使我们能够从测试时计算中释放更多东西。 在我们迄今为止训练过的所有模型中，Laguna S 2.1 在非思维模式和思维模式之间的评估和感知质量差异最大：它的内部独白非常有效，特别是对于更困难、复杂的问题。

小团队只有集中精力才能取得如此快的进展。 我们专注于两个赌注。

第一个赌注：我们继续关注代理编码能力。 通往智能的道路是通过编码能力和灵活的软件界面来实现的。 随着模型智能的进步，这一点变得越来越明显：我们现在看到模型作为代理，使用软件与其环境进行交互，进行数小时甚至数天的连贯工作。 Laguna S 2.1 显示了该领域的功能，这些功能仅在 6 个月前为前沿模型保留，而且尺寸足够小，可以在单个 NVIDIA DGX Spark 上运行。

第二个赌注是网络可以解压：几乎人类所写的所有内容都记录了答案，而不是到达那里的思维，我们相信强化学习可以恢复这种思维。 此次发布是第一次下注的证据。 第二个我们仍在积极开发中，并很高兴在未来分享更多信息。

三个月推出三款车型

我们的内部研究和工程平台（我们称之为模型工厂）使我们能够将模型开发过程工业化。 我们投入巨资不断改进研究和模型构建的流程；最大限度地提高研究迭代和集成速度，并最大限度地减少研究人员需要对簿记和基础设施投入的注意力。

在 Laguna M.1 发布后不到 3 个月的时间里，我们已经推动我们的技术以一半的运行大小提供了一个更强大的模型。 我们将在明年将其推广到越来越大的型号中。

开始使用

Laguna S 2.1 从第一天起就在 OpenMDW-1.1 下的 Hugging Face 上可用，具有 BF16、FP8、INT4 和 NVFP4 权重、官方 GGUF 和 MLX 转换以及官方 DFlash 草案模型。

我们在整个生态系统中开展工作，以便开发人员可以在他们已经构建的地方运行 Laguna S 2.1。 NVIDIA 帮助优化了整个硬件的推理，从 Blackwell 系统上的 TRT-LLM 服务和 NVFP4 到单个 NVIDIA DGX Spark。 vLLM、SGLang 和 Ollama 从第一天起就支持开放服务和本地推理。

对于托管访问，Laguna S 2.1 可通过 Baseten 的模型库和 Frontier Gateway、OpenRouter（包括免费端点和专用 1M 上下文部署）以及 Vercel AI Gateway 获得。

您还可以通过 Kilo、Hermes Agent、pi、OpenCode、OpenClaw 和 Cline 以及我们基于终端的编码代理 pool 使用 Laguna S 2.1。 在池中，使用 /thought-level 切换每个会话的思维。

在 OpenRouter 上，免费端点提供 256K 上下文。 专用付费端点以每 1M 代币 0.10 美元的输入、0.20 美元的输出和 0.01 美元的缓存读取提供完整的 1M 上下文窗口。

对于想要更进一步的开发人员，Laguna S 2.1 可以使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 和 Prime Intellect 的 Prime Lab 进行后训练。 ZML 的 LLMD 框架可在各种硬件上运行。
